languages.text: "Я Альва-9, командующая скитариями добывающей станции Тиркуаз-4. На доверенной мне территории произошло нарушение священной заповеди Омниссии. По протоколу 12.33 доставка {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}прометия{/g} на главную станцию невозможна, пока техноересь не будет устранена".

traits.locale_text: "Я, Альва-9, командующая скитариями добывающей станции Тиркуаз -4. На доверенной мне территории произошло нарушение священной заповеди Омниссии. По протоколу 12.33 доставка {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}прометия{/g} на материнскую станцию невозможна, пока еретех не будет устранен".

languages.text: "I am Alva-9. I command the Skitarii of mining station Tirkuaz-4. A violation of one of the Omnissiah's sacred commandments has occurred within the territory under my purview. In accordance with Protocol 12.33, delivery of {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} to the primary station is impossible until the tech-heresy is eliminated."
languages.original_text: "Я Альва-9, командующая скитариями добывающей станции Тиркуаз-4. На доверенной мне территории произошло нарушение священной заповеди Омниссии. По протоколу 12.33 доставка {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}прометия{/g} на главную станцию невозможна, пока техноересь не будет устранена".

languages.text: 「私はアルバ9、鉱山基地ティルクアズ4のアルファ・スキタリウスです。私の管轄区域で、オムニシアの聖なる戒律が侵されました。12.33条の規定に従い、異端者が排除されるまでは、母基地へのプロメシウムの輸送は不可能です」
languages.original_text: "I am Alva-9, Alpha-Skitarius of mining station Tirkuaz-4. A violation of a sacred commandment of the Omnissiah has occurred in the territory under my purview. In accordance with Protocol 12.33, delivery of promethium to the mother station is impossible until the heretech is eliminated."

traits.locale_text: 「私はアルバ9、鉱山基地ティルクアズ4のアルファ・スキタリウスです。私の管轄区域で、オムニシアの聖なる戒律が侵されました。12.33条の規定に従い、異端者が排除されるまでは、母基地へのプロメシウムの輸送は不可能です。」

languages.text: «Soy Alva-9, estoy al mando de los Skitarii de la estación minera Tirkuaz 4. Se ha producido una violación de un sagrado mandamiento del Omnissiah en el territorio que me corresponde vigilar. Conforme el protocolo 12.33, la entrega del {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}prometio{/g} a la estación principal no es posible hasta que se elimine la tecnoherejía».
languages.original_text: "I am Alva-9. I command the Skitarii of mining station Tirkuaz-4. A violation of one of the Omnissiah's sacred commandments has occurred within the territory under my purview. In accordance with Protocol 12.33, delivery of {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} to the primary station is impossible until the tech-heresy is eliminated."

traits.locale_text: «Soy Alva-9, estoy al mando de los Skitarii de la estación minera Tirkuaz 4. Se ha producido una violación de un sagrado mandamiento del Omnissiah en el territorio que me corresponde vigilar. Conforme el protocolo 12.33, la entrega del {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}prometio{/g} a la estación principal no es posible hasta que se elimine la tecnoherejía».

languages.text: “我是阿尔瓦-9，负责指挥提库阿兹4号采矿站的护教军。我辖区内发生了亵渎欧姆尼赛亚神圣戒律的事件。根据12.33协议，在技术异端被清除前，决不能向主站继续输送{g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}钷素{/g}。”
languages.original_text: "I am Alva-9. I command the Skitarii of mining station Tirkuaz-4. A violation of one of the Omnissiah's sacred commandments has occurred within the territory under my purview. In accordance with Protocol 12.33, delivery of {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} to the primary station is impossible until the tech-heresy is eliminated."

traits.locale_text: “我是阿尔瓦-9，负责指挥提库阿兹4号采矿站的护教军。我辖区内发生了亵渎欧姆尼赛亚神圣戒律的事件。根据12.33协议，在技术异端被清除前，决不能向主站继续输送{g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}钷素{/g}。”

languages.text: "Ich bin Alva-9. Ich befehlige die Skitarii von Minenstation Tirkuaz-4. Innerhalb meines Zuständigkeitsbereichs gab es einen Verstoß gegen eines der heiligen Gebote des Omnissiah. Gemäß Protokoll 12.33 sind {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}Promethiumlieferungen{/g} an die Primärstation bis zur Eliminierung der Tech-Ketzerei nicht möglich."
languages.original_text: "I am Alva-9. I command the Skitarii of mining station Tirkuaz-4. A violation of one of the Omnissiah's sacred commandments has occurred within the territory under my purview. In accordance with Protocol 12.33, delivery of {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} to the primary station is impossible until the tech-heresy is eliminated."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin Alva-9. Ich befehlige die Skitarii von Minenstation Tirkuaz-4. Innerhalb meines Zuständigkeitsbereichs gab es einen Verstoß gegen eines der heiligen Gebote des Omnissiah. Gemäß Protokoll 12.33 sind {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}Promethium{/g}lieferungen an die Primärstation bis zur Eliminierung der Tech-Ketzerei nicht möglich."

languages.text: "Ben Alva-9, Tirkuaz-4 maden istasyonunun Skitariuslarını komuta ediyorum. Yetki alanım altındaki bölgede Hermesih'in kutsal bir emrinin ihlali gerçekleşti. Protokol 12.33 uyarınca tekno kâfirlik ortadan kaldırılana dek ana istasyona {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}prometyum{/g} teslimatı imkânsızdır."
languages.original_text: "I am Alva-9. I command the Skitarii of mining station Tirkuaz-4. A violation of one of the Omnissiah's sacred commandments has occurred within the territory under my purview. In accordance with Protocol 12.33, delivery of {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} to the primary station is impossible until the tech-heresy is eliminated."

traits.locale_text: "Ben Alva-9, Tirkuaz-4 maden istasyonunun Skitariuslarını komuta ediyorum. Yetki alanım altındaki bölgede Hermesih'in kutsal bir emrinin ihlali gerçekleşti. Protokol 12.33 uyarınca tekno kâfirlik ortadan kaldırılana dek ana istasyona {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}prometyum{/g} teslimatı imkânsızdır."

languages.text: « Je suis Alva-9, commandante des Skitarii de la station minière Tirkuaz-4. Une infraction à l'un des commandements sacrés de l'Omnimessie a été commise sur le territoire dont je suis responsable. Conformément au protocole 12.33, toute livraison de {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}prométhium{/g} à la station principale est impossible tant que la technohérésie subsiste. »
languages.original_text: "I am Alva-9. I command the Skitarii of mining station Tirkuaz-4. In accordance with Protocol 12.33, delivery of {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} to the primary station is impossible until the tech-heresy is eliminated."
